proposedCorrection.reason: Avoid the tsx CLI IPC server while retaining the same TypeScript loader and pure generator implementation.

requiredValidationBeforeAnyWorkerSelecti: create a new versioned neutral-repository contract and hashes
prove the corrected generator command exits zero inside the built-in :workspace Codex sandbox
prove clean schema-first generation matches the pure renderer byte-for-byte
prove schema-drift repair matches the pure renderer byte-for-byte
prove diagnostic and evaluator commands do not mutate repositories unexpectedly
complete a separately authorized non-scored calibration under a re-frozen runtime before scored execution
prohibitedActions: do not alter or rerun observed calibration outcomes
do not select a replacement worker from invalid-environment evidence
do not begin scored baseline, protected trials, controls, Phase 5, or UI work
